title: Aggregate tasks across boards

posts.author: benj (Ben Hart)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I am relatively new to Monday, but have been using tools like it for quite some time. My question is hopefully pretty basic:

Our manager needs to look across several boards (~20) to view her teams work. She is looking develop a rough view of workload for each of us and potentially at blockers.

I am thinking like a “My Work” but instead a “My Team’s Work”. Can we do that with a “Following” column? Could she then track say milestone tasks status across boards somewhere if she follows all the milestone tasks?

Is this built-in functionality, something we’d need to customize, or more of an outside reporting development? Thanks in advance!

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml: @benj if an add-on is an option, you can do that with Analytics & Reports by Screenful. Here’s a guide for creating reports boards: Creating reports - Screenful Guide for All. Feel free to DM me or email at support@screenful.com if you want to know more.
